text: Configured the LMS: enrollment rules, completion criteria, due dates, and reporting
Tested the course in the LMS with a test account end-to-end
Prepared and rehearsed facilitators for ILT/VILT delivery
Conducted a facilitator dry run with timing and Q&A practice
Briefed managers on the training purpose, content, and their role in reinforcement
Sent learner communication: what, why, when, and how to access
Planned and (ideally) run a pilot session before full rollout
Documented and addressed issues found during the pilot
Established technical support contact or FAQ for learner issues
Set up completion and participation tracking
Confirmed all learners are enrolled and have access
Scheduled post-launch check-in with sponsor to review early completion data
